# truenas_group (Data Source)

Provides information about a group on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_group" "wheel" {
  name = "wheel"
}

output "wheel_gid" {
  value = data.truenas_group.wheel.gid
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The group name to look up.

### Read-Only

- `builtin` (Boolean) Whether this is a built-in system group.
- `gid` (Number) The UNIX GID.
- `id` (Number) The group ID.
- `smb` (Boolean) Whether the group has SMB access.
- `sudo_commands` (String) Comma-separated list of sudo commands allowed.
